description: Lock Ancient source-fit cleanup for early boats, lime plaster, and ochre processing chronology.

checks.reason: Ochre pigment processing is anchored to the Blombos Cave ochre-processing workshop reported at 100,000 years ago.
Lime plaster is anchored to southern Levant evidence for lime plaster technology around 12,000 years ago.
The source-backed lime plaster chronology predates the fired-bricks node and does not require brick manufacture.
Refined dugout canoes are anchored to the Mesolithic Pesse canoe artifact.
